case_title: ROGELIO DZUL CASTRO VS. GARCIA'S JANITORIAL A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, ROGELIO DZUL AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA'S JANITORIAL A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, GABINO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TORRES, MARIA INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, ROGELIO DZUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA'S JANITORIAL A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, GABINO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TORRES, MARIA INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $2,399.67 PRINCIPAL, $8.54 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,633.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
